title: SWIMMING LOCATIONS - 211info
text: YMCA OF DOUGLAS COUNTY SWIMMING LOCATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a public swimming space. 1151 NW Stewart Parkway Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: YMCA members and guests of members only Hours: Monday-Friday 5am-8pm, Saturday 8am-5pm. Aquatic center closes a half hour before facility. (541) 440-9622 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 440-9622 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: Extreme Heat Swimming Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YMCA OF DOUGLAS COUNTY
